root.name: Slide 1 Title Modification
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly changed the title text on Slide 1 from 'Application Layer' to 'Network Application Layer' and made it bold, without introducing extraneous modifications.

children.name: Title Text Changed Correctly
children.description: Checks if the title text on Slide 1 is exactly 'Network Application Layer'.

children.name: Title Text Is Bold
children.description: Checks if the title text on Slide 1 is fully bolded (every run is bold).

children.name: No Extraneous Slide 1 Changes
children.description: Checks that no other changes (such as layout, other text, or elements) were made to Slide 1 except for the title text and its bold formatting.

children.name: No Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Checks that no other slides were modified, added, or removed.

metadata.task: Slide 1: Change the title text 'Application Layer' to 'Network Application Layer' and make it bold
